name: openclaw-frontier-stack
description: Interoperable agent skills + hooks + orchestration harness. 51 skills (28 ecomm marketing as Modern Skills + 11 engineering workflow + 3 operator + the v0.5.0 cohort), 11 role contracts, engineer CLI (openclaw), live agent runner daemon (openclaw-agent), 4 coordination patterns (fan-out, fan-in, chain, voting), and 5 autonomous loops. Compatible with any agent that supports the Agent Skills specification (agentskills.io).
